## 🌡️ `celsius_to_f` — Tool Forged & Verified

### Tool Details
| Property | Value |
|---|---|
| **Name** | `celsius_to_f` |
| **Lifecycle** | ✅ Active |
| **Scope** | Agent |

| **Test Cases** | 9/9 passed (3 provided + 6 auto-generated) |
| **Pipeline** | Static → Format → Resolve → Sandbox → Self-Test → Trust ✅ |

### Conversion Formula
```
°F = (°C × 9/5) + 32
```

### Result: 100°C → Fahrenheit
```
(100 × 9/5) + 32 = 212°F
```

> 🫧 **100°C = 212°F** — the boiling point of water at sea level, confirmed by the self-test suite during forging.

The tool is now available in the forge registry and will auto-activate on triggers like *"convert celsius to fahrenheit"* or *"temperature conversion"*.
